entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A crop whose grains are naturally rich in high quality starch, dietary fibre, polyphenols and micronutrients.

entities.name: STARCH
entities.description: A high quality carbohydrate found in pearl millet grains.

entities.name: DIETARY FIBRE
entities.description: A nutritional component found in pearl millet grains.

entities.name: POLYPHENOLS
entities.description: Antioxidant compounds found in pearl millet grains.

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENTS
entities.description: Essential minerals and vitamins found in pearl millet grains.

entities.name: PMIGAP
entities.description: A global diversity panel comprising 166 pearl millet accessions.

entities.name: TOTAL STARCH
entities.description: The overall starch content measured in pearl millet grains.

entities.name: RAPIDLY DIGESTIBLE STARCH
entities.description: Starch that is quickly digested into glucose.

entities.name: SLOWLY DIGESTIBLE STARCH
entities.description: Starch that is digested at a slower rate.

entities.name: RESISTANT STARCH
entities.description: Starch that resists digestion in the small intestine.

entities.name: GWAS
entities.description: Genome-wide association studies used to identify candidate genes associated with starch traits.

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single-nucleotide polymorphisms used as genetic markers to identify associations with traits.

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Probable genes identified in flanking regions of associated SNPs.

entities.name: LINKAGE DISEQUILIBRIUM
entities.description: The non-random association of alleles at different loci, explaining correlation between nearby variants.

entities.name: STARCH BIOSYNTHESIS PATHWAY
entities.description: The biological pathway responsible for the production of starch.

entities.name: PGL_GLEAN_10026059
entities.description: A starch synthase gene identified as a key candidate for slowly digestible starch.

entities.name: PGL_GLEAN_10027180
entities.description: A starch synthase gene identified as a key candidate for slowly digestible starch.

entities.name: AMYLOSE BIOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: The biological process of synthesizing amylose.

entities.name: PGL_GLEAN_10018323
entities.description: A gene encoding beta-amylase identified as a candidate for rapidly digestible starch.

entities.name: PGL_GLEAN_10009197
entities.description: A gene encoding alpha-amylase identified as a candidate for rapidly digestible starch.

entities.name: LOW GLYCAEMIC INDEX
entities.description: A desired trait where blood glucose levels rise slowly after consumption.

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional plant breeding approaches used to develop new varieties.

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: Breeding approaches utilizing molecular markers to develop new varieties.
